Interface IMapServerFindResults

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Carto

ESRI.Server.Carto.dll

Provides access to the Map Server Find Results Interface.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
